chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Ist Appeal No. 122 of 2015 Ist Appeal No. 123 of 2015 ______________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge. For hearing of main case 06-12-2023 Counsel for the appellant was put on notice to satisfy regarding the claim of markup in terms of order dated 19.11.2018 and counsel is not appearing since 14.12.2018, his absence is apparent on a number of dates including 24.02.2022, 15.04.2022 & 06.03.2023 and so also today. It seems ever since appellant was put on notice he has failed to appear. Both these Ist Appeals are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is directed to place copy of this order in connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad
